name: HWM_RULE_TMPLT_INPUTS_VL
query: SELECT ri.RULE_TMPLT_INPUT_ID, ri.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, ri.ENTERPRISE_ID, ri.RULE_TMPLTS_ID, ri.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, ri.INPUT_NAME, ri.USER_DEFINED_NAME, rti.USER_DEFINED_IN_NAME, rti.IN_NAME_DESCRIPTION, ri.RULE_PARAMETER_TYPE, ri.PARM_VALUE_REQUIRED, ri.VALUE_SET_ID, ri.LOOKUP_TYPE, ri.ROW_SEQUENCE, ri.CREATED_BY, ri.CREATION_DATE, ri.LAST_UPDATED_BY, ri.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ri.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, ri.SGUID SGUID FROM HWM_RULE_TMPLT_INPUTS ri, HWM_RULE_TMPLT_INPUTS_TL rti WHERE ri.RULE_TMPLT_INPUT_ID = rti.RULE_TMPLT_INPUT_ID AND rti.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
